implementation_intent: Visual reference for TL runtime particle system, not fixed production sprites.

styles.density: high at base, medium at outer arc
styles.occlusion: keep lower third open around reward object; fan outward from behind chest
styles.tl_notes: Use gravity and drag; spawn from low center with angle spread 55-125deg upward. Good for chest-open climax.

styles.occlusion: place behind reward object; avoid full-screen white flash
styles.tl_notes: Use deterministic star-angle presets plus small jitter. Good for task-complete feedback.

styles.occlusion: reserve central 34% diameter for prize/sticker readability
styles.tl_notes: Use ring radius easing and alpha fade; vary hue within palette, not random RGB.

accessibility.respect_reduce_motion: halve particle count and skip secondary burst
